headline: Super vs ChatGPT — Personal AI Agents Compared

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs ChatGPT. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs ChatGPT

summary: ChatGPT is the world’s most popular general AI assistant, increasingly powerful for conversation, research, and lightweight automation. Super is built for a different job: durable personal AI agents that actually operate computers and reuse a computer-use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time. This page fairly compares where ChatGPT excels and where Super is the sharper alternative for real computer-use work.
